about.title: About CSS Engineers
paragraphs: CSS ENGINEERS PRIVATE LIMITED is a leading transmission line survey, geotechnical, and foundation engineering company based in Chakia, Chandauli, Uttar Pradesh, India. With over 12 years of expertise, we deliver comprehensive surveying and engineering solutions for major transmission line projects across India.

Our team combines advanced surveying technologies with deep field expertise to provide accurate route alignment, detailed surveys, and robust geotechnical assessments. We have successfully completed 17+ transmission line projects totaling over 1,700 km for India's leading power sector contractors.
We are committed to delivering precision, reliability, and sustainable solutions that drive infrastructure development across the nation.

highlights.title: Objective
highlights.text: To provide world-class transmission line survey, geotechnical engineering, and foundation solutions that support India's power infrastructure growth with accuracy, innovation, and reliability.

highlights.title: Our Strength
highlights.text: Skilled workforce of 30+ professionals, advanced surveying equipment (Total Stations, DGPS, GPS), comprehensive project experience, and proven track record with leading power contractors.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for transmission line projects, surveys, and geotechnical engineering
